title: Portfolio and Promotion Controls Complete
exit_criteria_met: Promotion decision packet requires explicit statistical policy key citations from config/eval_gates.toml.
Promotion packets require a declared deployment ladder state; missing state is a hard error.
Promotion approvals are blocked below observed_demo ladder state.
Material deployment-fit deltas (>= 0.05) require a new deployment bundle reference.
Portfolio challenger lane blocks handoff candidates without an existing promotion packet.
Challenger-vs-benchmark identity conflict is surfaced as a blocked slot report.
Improvement claims cannot hide deployment-fit changes inside alpha claims.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: PromotionDecisionPacket gained statistical_policy_keys, deployment_ladder_state, deployment_fit_delta, deployment_fit_change_requires_new_bundle, deployment_bundle_id

src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: write_promotion_decision_packet enforces policy-key, ladder-state, ladder-floor, and deployment-fit-delta bundle checks; _resolve_latest_candidate_ladder_state helper added; P10 constants defined

src/agentic_forex/campaigns/portfolio.py: gap-slot blank-slate research path now checks for promotion packet on handoff candidate; locked benchmark candidate reference surfaced; challenger-vs-benchmark identity conflict blocked
Goblin/contracts/candidate-scorecard.md: governance rule for deployment-fit delta separation added
assumptions: statistical-policy key floor uses the four core parity/validation keys from eval_gates.toml; operator can override by supplying explicit list.
deployment_fit_delta threshold of 0.05 is deterministic from P10 spec.
